title: Viewer Board not working properly

posts.author: CacttusMan (Chris Godin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We try to put a board in Viewer Only in the Board Permissions tab, which doesn’t work properly.
The problem is that in the description of the Viewer Only mode, you are saying that we can write updates as viewer, but that’s not true. When we try to write one, it says that we need to be a board member to do so. Which is a contradictory statement.

Thank you

Christopher
